name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new idea, job discovery source, or AI enrichment model.

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

**Describe the proposed solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Outline any new CLI commands, options, or Pydantic schema changes needed.

**Describe alternatives you have considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you have evaluated.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or mockup designs about the feature request here.
